item.title: Best AirPods 3 cases in 2024
item.itunes:title: Best AirPods 3 cases in 2024
item.itunes:author: XDA[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
The Apple AirPods 3 launched back in late 2021, introducing a cleaner design and a number of new features and technologies. These include Spatial Audio, water resistance, a longer battery life, MagSafe charging support, and more. Despite these earbuds being solid, they're still prone to getting damaged. After all, accidents occur all the time, especially when you least expect them to.

If you use the AirPods 3, then it's also a great idea to invest in a protective case. Or, perhaps it is time to get a new case if yours is wearing out by now. Not only will a good case offer protection, but it could also liven up the appearance of the otherwise flat white charging case. To help you with the process, we've listed some of the best AirPods 3 case options currently available.

  • Editor's choice
    KOREDA Airpods 3 Case

    This KOREDA AirPods 3 Case is clear and lets you show off the design of your AirPods. It comes in multiple colors, so you can pick the one that suits your taste. It also has a carrying loop that you can attach to a bag or belt when on the go.

    $8 at Amazon
  • Premium pick
    VRS Design Modern AirPods 3 case
    $19 $23 Save $4

    If you are looking for a durable option that is made of rugged PC and flexible TPU, then this case is the one to go for. It is available in four different colors and patterns to pick from, and it works with most wireless chargers. Plus, it has a handy carrying loop.

    $19 at Amazon
  • Budget pick
    R-fun AirPods 3 case
    $4 $6 Save $2

    If you're looking for something vibrant and fun, this case offers 34 different color options. It is made from silicone and it keeps the front LED visible. And worry not, it supports wireless charging, too. Plus, it has a handy carrying loop you can affix to a belt or bag.

    $4 at Amazon
  • Leather pick
    Maxjoy AirPods 3 case

    Available in black, brown, and pink, this PU leather case offers a magnetic clasp, wireless charging support, and a front slit to keep the LED visible at all times. As an added bonus, you also get a storage bag. It can also be affixed to a bag or belt with the carrying loop.

    $16 at Amazon
  • Rugged pick
    SUPCASE UB Pro AirPods 3 case

    In partnership with Supcase

    If you need sturdy protection for your AirPods 3, this SUPCASE case is excellent. Made with polycarbonate and TPU, the case provides top-notch protection for your AirPods against drops and scratches. It also includes a carabiner to clip the AirPods to a backpack or belt when you are on the go.

    $19 at Amazon
  • Best texture
    Caseology Legion AirPods 3 Case

    The Caseology Legion AirPods 3 case comes with a matte finish to resist fingerprints and smudges. In addition, the back of the case has a textured finish for an enhanced grip. It also has a carrying loop, and you can buy the case in two nice colors, either Stone Navy or Stone Charcoal.

    $16 at Amazon
  • Style choice
    i-Blason Cosmo AirPods 3 case

    In partnership with i-Blason

    $16 $17 Save $1

    This is a case that stands out from the regular cases for the AirPods 3. It's colorful and stylish, making your earbuds look like a fashion accessory. It's made from impact-resistant TPU for durable protection and the handy carrying loop lets you attach the case to a bag or belt.

    $16 at Amazon
  • Military-themed
    Maxjoy Case for AirPods 3

    If you're looking for a military-themed case to protect your 3rd Gen AirPods, look no further than the Maxjoy Case. This hard shell shockproof case promises to survive the roughest handling. It features a clip on the front to prevent accidental opening and comes with its own bag. There are many color variants, including some camo options.

    $10 at Amazon
  • Best for gamers
    Elago AW3 AirPods 3 case

    This sleek AirPods 3 case features a retro video game console design, comes in three different colors, and will protect your AirPods from all manner of drops and scratches. Plus, it'll only cost you $15 or even less. If you're a gamer, this is a great case for you.

    $12 at Amazon

The best cases for the AirPods 3: The bottom line

When you are choosing an AirPods 3 case, take some time to consider a few factors. Namely, do you want to conceal the appearance of the charging case or show it off? If it's the latter, go for something transparent and minimalist. If it's the former, take the opportunity to experiment with more unusual designs and patterns. Also, take into account whether your AirPods 3 will be subjected to some rough conditions. If you are the kind of person who misplaces small electronics, the option for a carrying strap or carabiner is a good idea, too.

Of all the options available here, our top pick for a case for the AirPods 3 goes to the KOREDA AirPods 3 case. We love the minimalist design of the charging case, and its transparency means you won't be concealing the AirPods 3 behind an opaque color. If you want something more premium, consider the VRS Design Modern AirPods 3 case, which boasts a sleek design and a handy carrying loop. On the other hand, the R-fun AirPods 3 case is cheap and colorful, making it a great budget pick.

Related
Apple AirPods 3: Everything you need to know about Apple's latest TWS earbuds

The new Apple AirPods 3 are here, bringing features like Spatial Audio and more. Here's everything you need to know about the TWS earbuds!
